metadata.description: Agent-native skills for AHCP (the Agent Human Coordination Protocol) — build app-specific notify / ask / task skills wired to your AHCP Hub.

plugins.name: ahcp-skills
plugins.description: Agent-native AHCP toolkit: 'implement' builds a conformant AHCP Hub in your app (any stack); 'build-notify' / 'build-ask' / 'build-task' generate app-specific sender skills. Independent — use only what you need.
